quote: Llamatik made on-device LLM inference finally practical in Kotlin. The API feels native, not like a wrapper around C++.
name: Alex Martínez

quote: We integrated local embeddings on iOS and Android with the same Kotlin code. That alone justified using Llamatik.
name: Sophie Laurent

quote: Privacy-first AI without cloud lock-in is exactly what we needed. Llamatik gives us full control over our stack.
name: Daniel Weber
